status: exact lightweight algebraic CEGAR analysis of the finite 3998-vs-0 witness; not a universal refinement, finite quotient, or proof

run_identity.command: env OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS=1 OMP_NUM_THREADS=1 MKL_NUM_THREADS=1 VECLIB_MAXIMUM_THREADS=1 NUMEXPR_NUM_THREADS=1 nice -n 15 python3 -B design/far_secant_translation_cegar.py --output /tmp/far-secant-translation-cegar.json

deterministic_repeat.canonicalization: parse JSON, delete resource_policy.elapsed_seconds and resource_policy.maximum_resident_platform_units, then encode with sort_keys=true and separators=(',', ':')
deterministic_repeat.reason_raw_hashes_differ: only nondeterministic elapsed-time and peak-resident observations differ

exact_algebra.ghost_incidence_test: r = mu - (c + M^{-1} x') cross g; incidence holds exactly iff r=(0,0,0)
exact_algebra.conclusion: the common current key omits a latent zero-current-effect endpoint-partner relation; direction alone is insufficient, while its exact centered Plucker moment decides the future incidence

finite_partition_audit.interpretation: one exact query bit is the information-theoretic minimum for this witness and removes all observed mask-transition conflicts, but not all full-state conflicts; every tested exact geometric refinement makes all states singleton and therefore supplies no nonvacuous finite-index evidence

proposed_sound_CEGAR_refinement.state_token: retain the discovered latent joint token (tagged endpoint stable/birth address, partner stable/birth/owner address, primitive direction g, exact centered moment mu) even when its current killed mask is empty
proposed_sound_CEGAR_refinement.transition: keep the two endpoint streams correlated; transport the joint line by the exact affine/cofactor rule and test every actual prefix c and candidate site x' with r=mu-(c+M^{-1}x') cross g
proposed_sound_CEGAR_refinement.why_exact_not_modular: exact Plucker data decides every incidence for this retained line and admits an exact transfer; the one-bit, mod-3, and post-selected rho refinements decide only observed finite queries

proved_by_this_computation: the displayed rational algebra exactly explains the finite 3998-vs-0 transition
the listed partition counts use decoded raw integer masks rather than mask hashes as semantic values
the three timing/resource-stripped executions are identical
not_proved: closure under every alternate connector action
a uniform far-secant tail or contraction bound
positive connector availability or the Erdos #193 theorem
limitations: the proposed token closes only the discovered tagged-partner line; other remote partners may force additional refinements
a selected-terminal relation misses a partner that is neither the selected endpoint nor otherwise retained
the L9 horizon omits current-L9 connector interiors and contains no selected L9 word
the finite trace has one realized action per stitch and no alternate-action Post closure
finite repeated-class congruence cannot establish a universal right congruence
exact Plucker refinements are singleton on these 146 states, so a separate contraction, ranking, promotion rule, or proved finite quotient is still required
